headline: Radian Group Stock Outperforms the Industry: Time to Buy?
summary: RDN's mortgage insurance strength, Inigo acquisition and lower claims support earnings growth and capital flexibility in 2026.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Prudential Financial, Raises Price Target to $106
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Ryan Krueger   maintains Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $100 to $106.
